description_long: This shotgun features a robust metallic barrel and receiver, with a dark, matte finish that suggests durability and resistance to wear. The grip and trigger area are accented with a wood-textured handle, providing both ergonomic comfort and a classic aesthetic. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a vented rail on top and a squared-off muzzle, indicating a tactical or urban design. The trigger guard is elongated and rectangular, offering ample space for finger placement and protection. The overall construction appears solid, with visible screws and mechanical joints, and the lack of a full stock suggests a compact, maneuverable form factor. The combination of metal and wood materials gives it a utilitarian yet traditional appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a metallic barrel and receiver, featuring a wood-textured pistol grip and an elongated trigger guard. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a short barrel and vented rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the metallic barrel, receiver, and wood-textured pistol grip, with the elongated trigger guard clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the squared-off muzzle, vented rail, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same metallic and wood construction, with the receiver and grip details mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and grip, showing the alignment of the barrel and the trigger guard from behind.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with a vented rail on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with a straight profile and ample finger space
